title: The House amid the Reeds · II
titleJa: 浅茅が宿　現代語訳・其の二

layers.label: Estrangement
layers.description: The whole movement in English: exclusion, wounded pride, and the first resolve to recover.

layers.label: The relatives withdraw
layers.description: Three units reveal how poverty alters Katsushirō’s place among his kin.

layers.label: The wound is felt
layers.description: Katsushirō receives their distance as a deep and personal humiliation.

layers.label: The house must rise
layers.description: His wounded feeling becomes a wish to restore the fortunes of the household.

layers.label: Deliberation
layers.description: The complete modern-Japanese sentence closes upon sustained inward calculation.
